policy: Hyundai Motor narrative sources are not runtime knowledge. They become runtime-eligible only after a human reviewer promotes atomic claims with companyId, companyScope, evidence locator, forward-looking label, and rights-safe source metadata. Source-page provenance is acceptable for dynamic IR pages when the file checksum, title, period, extraction hash, and source page URL are preserved.
